name: Elytra Optima
description:
Keys: H toggles Elytra Optima, J cycles strategies.
GitHub: https://github.com/hzyhhzy/elytra-strategy-lab
Pitch-only Elytra strategy mod using optimized flight profiles: minimum-start-height launch (>35 m), fastest climb (~20 m/cycle), and fastest horizontal flight (~33 m/s).
